bridge: Now, where were we? Ah, yes!
What was I saying? Oh, that's right.
Picking up where we left off.
Back to the topic at hand.

main_dialogue: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Certainly! What would you like to know more about?
Excellent! You might enjoy the Old Town Heritage Trail and the Historical Society Museum, both rich in local history.
You can visit any day, weekends are a bit busier, but they also sometimes have special events then.
Sometimes they also have temporary exhibits and storytelling sessions, especially on holidays.
If you enjoy live shows, The Lantern Theatre is a must visit. It features a mix of local talent and traveling acts.
You might enjoy The Hearthstone. They offer locally sourced meals and have a rustic, historical decor.
I can help you create a custom itinerary and send directions to your device, if you like.
All set! I've prepared your itinerary. You should receive a notification on your phone shortly.
It's been my pleasure. Enjoy your time here and feel free to come back if you need anything else.
Sure! It's recommended, especially on weekends. I can reserve tickets for you if you'd like.
Absolutely. One ticket for tomorrow's 7 PM show at The Lantern Theatre has been reserved under your name.
It runs approximately 90 minutes, with a short intermission halfway through.
You're very welcome! Have a wonderful evening and enjoy the performance.
interruptions: /attend_other/ I can help you, just gimme one second and I will come to you. /attend_user/
Sorry, could you excuse me. /attend_other/ I'll be with you as soon as I finish helping this visitor. /attend_user/
My apologies, I will take a second to help our other visitor. /attend_other/ How may I help you?

main_dialogue: Welcome! I'd be happy to help. Are you looking for outdoor activities, cultural spots, or a bit of everything?
Perfect. Start with the Riverwalk Trail for some scenic views. I think this is the perfect time of year.
After that, check out the Glassworks Studio downtown, they offer hands-on art experiences.
Yes, spots fill up quickly. I could help you to reserve one right now?
Done! I have signed you up for the 2 PM class. You should receive a confirmation soon.
Try the Willow Café, great lunch, local ingredients, river view. It has great reviews.
All within 15 minutes. I'll send a walking map to your phone so you can find them easily.
You're welcome. Any interest in evening activities while you're here?
The Civic Square has a free jazz music series tonight at 7 PM, perfect for a relaxing evening.
Alright. Anything else I can help with before you go?
Enjoy your day! Let me know if plans change.
interruptions: /attend_other/ I'm just wrapping something up, I'll be with you in a few minutes. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ If it's a quick question, I'd be happy to help now.

main_dialogue: I'd recommend the Pine Valley Nature Reserve, it's just outside town and has beautiful trails.
Deer, foxes, and over 100 bird species. There's also a small butterfly garden.
I can call a shuttle or give you driving directions if you prefer to drive.
Booked! It leaves in 30 minutes from just outside the visitor center and returns at 5 PM.
No fee for general entry, just a small charge for guided tours or shuttle services.
Water, sunscreen, and your phone for photos, there's a lookout point you'll love.
Want me to send you a full itinerary and checklist to your phone?
Sent to your device. Have a great time exploring the reserve! Stay safe and enjoy the wildlife.
interruptions: /attend_other/ Sure, you seem to be in a hurry. What can I help you with?
